Operation 'searchVehiclesEnhanced' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies that search criteria are provided via request body, specifies the return type (paginated Vehicle list), and explains filtering capabilities. This helps AI agents understand what parameters to construct and what to expect in the response.

data.current_description: Search for vehicles with filtering, sorting, and pagination.
data.description_suggestion: Search fleet vehicles with advanced filtering, sorting, and pagination capabilities. Accepts search criteria via request body including filter conditions, sort parameters, and pagination settings. Returns a paginated list of Vehicle objects matching the search criteria. Supports partial matching and multiple filter conditions.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies that search criteria are provided via request body, specifies the return type (paginated Vehicle list), and explains filtering capabilities. This helps AI agents understand what parameters to construct and what to expect in the response.

message: Operation 'updateVehicle' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about what data can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, what is returned, and authentication requirements. Enhanced version clarifies the request body structure, return value, update behavior, and security context for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update an existing vehicle by its unique identifier.
data.description_suggestion: Update an existing fleet vehicle's information by its unique identifier. Accepts a Vehicle object with updated fields in the request body. Returns the updated Vehicle object. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Requires authentication and appropriate tenant access.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about what data can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, what is returned, and authentication requirements. Enhanced version clarifies the request body structure, return value, update behavior, and security context for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Extract data from an RTA database table. Uses the https://api.rtafleet.com server.
data.description_suggestion: Extract data from a specified RTA Fleet Management database table. Requires the table name as a path parameter and supports filtering, sorting, and pagination via query parameters. Returns the extracted records from the specified table. Useful for bulk data retrieval and reporting purposes. Requires appropriate authentication and data access permissions.
